title: 花丛中的甜美少女写真
author: BeautyVerse
prompt: 一张超写实的街头花园肖像，描绘了一位亚洲女偶像。主体居中，前方是一片点缀着橙色小花的茂密树篱。她身穿蓝色碎花连衣裙，米色开衫略微滑落，颈间戴着珍珠项链，手提一个带有俏皮挂饰的银色手提包。在阴天光线下拍摄，以获得光滑的皮肤和鲜艳的绿色植物；保留精致的花卉纹理、织物纹理和温暖、真诚的笑容。
prompt_en: An ultra-realistic street-garden portrait of an asian female idol. Subject centered in front of a thick hedge speckled with small orange blossoms. She wears a blue floral dress, cream cardigan slipping slightly, pearls at the neck, and carries a silver tote with a playful charm. Shoot under overcast light for smooth skin and vivid greenery; preserve fine floral texture, fabric grain, and a warm, candid smile.

title: 类似摄影集的精美版面
author: @Ankit_patel211
prompt: 让指定角色看起来像是在经纬度 35.63323748316045, 139.88033890258112 处观光。设计一个类似摄影集的精美版面。充分利用 9:16 的比例，为这本日本杂志制作一个专题页面。这将是一个重要的阅读页面，会影响访问量，因此请尽可能多地包含信息。

title: 充满电力的肖像——8K艺术领域的全新视野
author: ShreyaYadav___
prompt: 这是一幅高度详细的8K数字插图，描绘的是一个人的特写镜头（与眼睛平行的视角），人物正面朝向观众，背景为纯净的白色。画面构图居中，主要展示上半身。人物的头发浓密、呈深色卷曲状，每根头发都清晰可见，且具有时尚的“凌乱”质感。他们佩戴着一副黑色边框的眼镜。整体视觉风格以灰度色调作为皮肤的底色，再搭配一件深色条纹T恤；同时，画面中融入了多种鲜艳的色彩（红色、橙色、黄色、绿色、蓝色和紫色），这些色彩仿佛被绘制或投射在人物的脸部、颈部和肩部上。这种风格化的、具有电影感的灯光效果营造出了强烈的对比度，呈现出类似漫画般的视觉效果，通过大胆的色彩点缀和高度细节化的纹理突出了人物的轮廓。人物的眼睛呈现出红棕色的色调。整幅作品线条清晰、结构规整，尤其是在头发和眼镜的刻画上展现了极高的细节水平，从而打造出一幅视觉冲击力强的现代肖像画，完美融合了单色与霓虹色彩的独特美感。该图片中的面部图像仅作为参考资料使用。
prompt_en: A highly detailed 8k digital illustration of a person, presented as a close-up, eye-level headshot, facing directly forward against a clean white background. The composition is centered, capturing the upper torso. The subject features voluminous, dark, curly hair with defined strands and a stylishly messy texture. They wear distinct black-framed glasses. The overall aesthetic combines a grayscale base for the skin and a dark, ribbed t-shirt with dynamic, vibrant splashes of*multi-colored light, including reds, oranges, yellows, greens, blues, and purples, which appear as if painted or projected onto the face, neck, and shoulders. This stylized, cinematic lighting creates sharp contrasts and a graphic novel aesthetic, emphasizing contours with bold color accents and highly detailed textures. The eyes have a reddish-brown hue. The artwork exhibits sharp lines, clean vectors, and a high level of detail in the hair and glasses,*creating a visually striking,modern portrait with a unique blend of monochrome and neon color. uploaded face as reference

title: Girl cornered by three male students
prompt: A girl who looks troubled as she is being talked to by three male students and is being driven back against a wall.
prompt_en: A girl who looks troubled as she is being talked to by three male students and is being driven back against a wall.

title: 儿童读物风格的彩色铅笔和水彩插画
author: Ai Prompts Lab
prompt: 手绘彩色铅笔插画，线条清晰，铅笔轮廓略显粗糙，结合柔和的水彩晕染纹理。明亮的马卡龙色调，色彩更浅、更鲜艳，饱和度自然。可见铅笔笔触与微妙的水彩渐变层叠。 温馨友好的基调，半卡通写实比例。简单的面部特征，点状眼睛和小微笑。平面而细致的着色，极少阴影，柔和高光，故事书插画感，温馨愉快的氛围，鲜明而柔和的调色板，儿童读物/生活素描风格，高清晰度，无写实感，无照片纹理。竖幅肖像。
prompt_en: Hand-drawn colored pencil illustration with clean line art and slightly rough pencil outlines [Use the uploaded image as reference], combined with soft watercolor wash textures. Bright pastel colors, lighter and more vivid tones with natural saturation. Visible pencil strokes layered with subtle watercolor gradients. Warm and friendly tone, semi-cartoon realistic proportions. Simple facial features with dot eyes and small smiles. flat yet detailed coloring, minimal shadows, soft highlights, storybook illustration feel, cozy and cheerful atmosphere, vibrant yet soft color palette, children-book / lifestyle sketch style, high clarity, no realism, no photo texture. Vertical portrait.

title: 温柔女子怀抱小白狗的写实肖像照
author: Melisa♡

title: 家居安全隐患识别分析
author: Glitter Gal
prompt: 分析这张图像中的安全隐患。将这个房间重新生成为黑白图像，并在每个发现的安全隐患周围加上明亮的霓虹红色边界框。具体需要查找以下隐患：火灾隐患、绊倒隐患以及电气问题。用小文本标签标注每个红色边界框，说明其危险性（例如：“火灾隐患”）。
prompt_en:
I asked Nano Banana Pro to find the possible hazards within a provided image, and this is what it found.
Prompt⤵️ Analyze this image for safety hazards. Re-generate this exact room in black and white, but overlay bright NEON RED bounding boxes around every safety risk you find. Specifically look for: fire risks, tripping hazards, and electrical issues. Label each red box with a small text tag explaining the danger (e.g., 'Fire Risk').

title: 极简诗意肖像
author: @aleenaamiir
prompt:
创建一个极简、诗意的插图，描绘一个[主体]，以[特写/半身/全身]呈现。
主体正处于[情绪或心理状态]，面部细节清晰，表情柔和自然。
加入一个微妙的超现实元素[意外物体/尺度变化/视觉隐喻]，反映其内心世界。
使用干净的形状、有限的配色、柔和的光线，以及宁静的背景。整体氛围应充满内省、电影感与静默的情感。
prompt_en:
Create a minimal, poetic illustration of a [Subject], shown from [close-up / half-body / full-body].

The subject is [emotion or state of Mind], with clear facial details and soft, natural expressions.
Introduce one subtle surreal element [unexpected object / scale shift / visual metaphor] that reflects their inner world.

Use clean shapes, limited color palette, gentle lighting, and a calm background. The mood should feel introspective, cinematic, and quietly emotional.

title: 高对比黑白艺术肖像九宫格拼贴
author: Favori

title: 一只人的手握着一枚细长狭长的竖版模切书签
author: @langzihan

title: 时尚大片：橙镜红衣女郎蓝天写真
author: Aijaz
prompt: 一张电影风格的时尚肖像，描绘了一位年轻女性，她留着波浪短发和稀疏的刘海，戴着圆形橙色墨镜和珍珠耳坠，身穿黑色高领毛衣和醒目的红色羽绒服，嘴唇柔和有光泽，妆容自然，微风轻拂着她的头发。照片从低角度拍摄，景深较浅，画面超现实，使用 85mm 镜头，f/1.8 光圈，暖金色日落光线，干净的蓝色天空背景，呈现出时尚杂志般的摄影风格，皮肤纹理细节丰富，阴影柔和，电影级色彩分级，Vogue 风格，焦点极其锐利，专业影棚品质。
prompt_en: A cinematic fashion portrait of a young woman with a short wavy bob haircut and wispy bangs, wearing round orange-tinted sunglasses, pearl drop earrings, a black turtleneck and a bold red puffer jacket, soft glossy lips, natural makeup, wind gently moving her hair, photographed from a low angle, shallow depth of field, ultra realistic, 85mm lens, f1.8, warm golden hour sunlight, clean blue sky background, editorial fashion photography, high detail skin texture, soft shadows, cinematic color grading, Vogue style, ultra sharp focus, professional studio quality

title: Aperture study portrait series of a model at dusk
author: Nicolechan
prompt: Using a Canon camera with an 85mm prime lens, generate the effect of gradually changing apertures at F1.8, F2.8, F10, and F14, with a gentle beautiful woman as the model and the background being the city at blue hour just after sunset.
prompt_en: Using a Canon camera with an 85mm prime lens, generate the effect of gradually changing apertures at F1.8, F2.8, F10, and F14, with a gentle beautiful woman as the model and the background being the city at blue hour just after sunset.

title: 系统推广中的夹心狗困境
author: ケアマネカトゥ
prompt: 一部漫画，讲述了一个为推广官方系统而创作的狗狗角色，却陷入两难境地。
prompt_en: 官製システム普及の為に生まれたイヌのキャラクターが、板挟みに苦しむ漫画

title: 夜市街拍：少女持冰淇淋与老虎机合影
author: 小肥兰的生活日记
prompt: 一张坦率的胶片照片，照片中是一位年轻女性，她留着深色头发和刘海，手里拿着一支正在融化的香草软冰淇淋甜筒，靠近嘴边，随意地拨弄着头发。她表情自然地直视镜头。她穿着一件超大号的蓝白条纹短袖衬衫，米色帆布手提包的肩带清晰可见。她站在一台灯光明亮的复古日式弹珠机旁，机器上装饰着蝴蝶图案，背景是夜晚一个凌乱、昏暗的城市街机角落。灯光：刺眼的直射机内闪光灯，产生硬阴影，高胶片颗粒感，真实的复古彩色胶片美学，逼真的纹理。风格：35 毫米街头摄影快照。--ar 3:2 --v 6.0 --q 2 --style raw
prompt_en: A candid film photograph of a young woman in uploaded image with dark hair and bangs, holding a melting {"ice cream flavor" "vanilla"} soft-serve ice cream cone near her mouth and casually touching her hair. She looks directly into the camera with a natural expression. She wears an oversized blue and white striped short-sleeve shirt and a beige canvas tote bag strap visible. She stands next to a brightly lit vintage Japanese pachislot machine with butterfly motifs in a cluttered, dimly lit urban arcade corner at night. Lighting: Harsh direct on-camera flash creating hard shadows, high film grain, authentic retro color film aesthetics, realistic textures. Style: 35mm street photography snap. --ar 3:2 --v 6.0 --q 2 --style raw

title: 未来一瞥
author: TheRelianceAI
prompt: 一段充满电影气息的镜头：[主体] 在夜晚的雨街中行走，身影被阴郁的霓虹灯点亮；水洼中倒映着周围的光影；背景中是朦胧的城市天际线。[主体] 仿佛置身于一种特殊的状态中，既感受到孤独，又不禁被周围充满活力的氛围所感染。
prompt_en: A cinematic rendering of [subject] walking through a rain-soaked street at night, illuminated by moody neon lights, reflections dancing on wet pavement, and a hazy urban skyline in the background. The subject feels alive, caught between solitude and electricity.

title: 蓝帽雪人夜景写真
author: Oogie
prompt:
```json
{
  "subject": "经典三球雪人，雪质纹理感强",
  "clothing": "{argument name=\"hat color\" default=\"Blue\"} 渔夫帽（尼龙质感），蓝色围巾（毛圈布质感）",
  "face": "深色圆形石头眼睛，橙色胡萝卜鼻子",
  "accessories": "配套的蓝色帽子和围巾套装",
  "environment": "漆黑的星空，冰冷的地面，高对比度",
  "lighting": "戏剧性的电影聚光灯，冷色调，突出纹理",
  "camera": "全景，略低角度，锐利对焦",
  "style": "3D 渲染风格，影棚摄影，极简主义，异想天开，超现实主义，8k 分辨率"
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "subject": "Classic three-ball snowman, highly textured snow",
  "clothing": "{argument name="hat color" default="Blue"} bucket hat (nylon texture), blue scarf (terry cloth texture)",
  "face": "Dark round stone eyes, orange carrot nose",
  "accessories": "Matching blue hat and scarf set",
  "environment": "Dark starry night sky, icy ground, high contrast",
  "lighting": "Dramatic cinematic spotlight, cool tones, accentuating textures",
  "camera": "Full shot, slightly low angle, sharp focus",
  "style": "3D render style, studio photography, minimalist, whimsical, photorealistic, 8k resolution"
}

title: 排球女将赛场指天庆祝
author: Sharon Riley
prompt:
Grok Imagine

{
"prompt_description": "一张聚焦的中近景动态照片，捕捉了一位女排球员在比赛中庆祝或做出手势的瞬间。",
"subject_details": {
"person": {
"gender": "女",
"age_range": "20多岁",
"expression": "严肃、专注或坚定的神情",

"action": "站在球场中央，直视镜头/观众，右臂举起，食指向上（表示“一分”或得分/胜利）",

"attire": "排球服：无袖黑白球衣，胸前印有数字“8”，黑色运动短裤（可见美津浓标志），右臂佩戴黑色紧身护臂。"

}
},

"setting_and_environment": {
"location": "室内体育馆/竞技场，具体来说是一个抛光的木质排球场",
"lighting": "明亮的专业体育场馆照明，突出前景中的球员，背景则采用柔和的焦点",
"background_elements": [
"拥挤的人群/观众，大多穿着深色服装（蓝色/黑色/灰色），营造出略微模糊但充满活力的氛围。",
"背景中其他球员（模糊），穿着类似的队服或对方球队的颜色（深蓝色/海军蓝）。",

"场边可见教练或工作人员（最左侧）。"

],

"atmosphere": "竞争激烈、气氛紧张的专业体育赛事。"

},

"photographic_style": {
"shot_type": "中近景（主体腰部以上）",
"perspective": "平视",

"focus": "主体清晰、深焦，背景人群和次要球员采用浅景深（散景效果）。",

"color_palette": "高对比度，以黑白球衣、暖色调木质球场和冷色调的体育馆及人群为主。",

"genre": "体育摄影，动作/抓拍。"

},
"关键词": [
"排球",
"运动员",

"女性",

"运动",

"比赛",

"竞技",

"队服",

"8号",

"强度",

"决心",

"庆祝",

"指向",

"室内球场",

"体育馆",

"美津浓",

"体育摄影",

"精彩瞬间"
]
}
prompt_en:
Grok Imagine
{
"prompt_description": "A focused, medium close-up, dynamic photograph capturing a female volleyball player on the court during a game, celebrating or giving a signal.",
"subject_details": {
"person": {
"gender": "female",
"age_range": "20s",
"expression": "Serious, intense, or focused determination",
"action": "Standing mid-court, looking directly at the camera/viewer, with her right arm raised and index finger pointing upwards (signaling 'one' or a score/win)",
"attire": "Volleyball uniform: sleeveless white and black jersey with the number '8' on the chest, black athletic shorts (Mizuno logo visible), black compression sleeve on the right arm."
}
},
"setting_and_environment": {
"location": "Indoor gymnasium/arena, specifically a polished wooden volleyball court",
"lighting": "Bright, professional sports arena lighting, highlighting the player in the foreground, with softer focus on the background",
"background_elements": [
"A packed crowd/audience, predominantly wearing dark clothing (blue/black/grey), creating a slightly blurred, high-energy atmosphere.",
"Other players in the background (out of focus), wearing similar uniforms or opposing team colors (dark blue/navy).",
"Coaches or staff visible on the sidelines (far left)."
],
"atmosphere": "Competitive, intense, professional sports event."
},
"photographic_style": {
"shot_type": "Medium close-up (waist up on the main subject)",
"perspective": "Eye-level",
"focus": "Sharp, deep focus on the main player, with a shallow depth of field (bokeh effect) on the background crowd and secondary players.",
"color_palette": "High-contrast, dominated by the black and white of the uniform, the warm tone of the wooden court, and the cool tones of the arena and crowd.",
"genre": "Sports photography, action/candid."
},
"keywords": [
"volleyball",
"athlete",
"female",
"sports",
"game",
"competition",
"uniform",
"number 8",
"intensity",
"determination",
"celebration",
"pointing",
"indoor court",
"gymnasium",
"Mizuno",
"sports photography",
"action shot"
]
}

title: 瑞克与莫蒂风格音乐视频分镜
author: firatbilal

title: PS5的技术蓝图
author: @egeberkina
prompt: 绘制一张双面板的技术蓝图，采用简洁的单色线条，布局与提供的 PlayStation 1 原理图完全一致。左侧面板，以精细的细线在白色背景上绘制完整的索尼 PlayStation 5 主机。右侧面板，绘制一张高度详细的 PS5 垂直分解图，将每个内部组件分层展示：外壳面板、面板、散热风扇、散热塔、蓝光光驱、主板、固态硬盘模块、电源、内部框架、接口、通风口、底座支架和螺丝。使用粗细一致的灰色细线，不要添加阴影。在每个部件周围添加编号的圆形标签，并在底部添加与参考蓝图相同的编号部件清单。将 SONY 标志、PlayStation 标志和“PlayStation 5”字样放置在左上角，位置和样式与上传的参考图像完全相同。整幅图应在构图、间距、字体和极简工程风格等方面保持一致。
prompt_en: A two-panel technical blueprint diagram in clean monochrome line-art, matching the exact layout of the provided PlayStation 1 schematic. On the left side, draw a full, intact Sony PlayStation 5 console in precise thin line-art on a white background. On the right side, draw a highly detailed, vertically exploded-view diagram of the PS5 showing each internal component separated into layers: outer shell panels, faceplates, cooling fan, heatsink tower, Blu-ray drive, motherboard, SSD module, power supply, internal frame, ports, vents, base stand, screws. Use consistent thin grey line-weight with no shading. Add numbered circular labels around each part, and include a matching numbered parts list at the bottom just like the reference blueprint. Place the SONY logo, PlayStation logo, and “PlayStation 5” text in the top left in the exact same position and style as the uploaded reference image. The entire artwork should mirror the composition, spacing, typography, and minimalist engineering-ma

title: 百科全书式信息卡片
author: @yyyole
prompt:
一张极简艺术风格的[芦笋]百科全书式信息卡片，
博物馆展品级别的设计品质，信息丰富但视觉克制

【整体构图 - 黄金分割布局】
- 画面比例：2:3竖版 或 3:4方形
- 三大视觉区域：
    * 顶部展示区（30%）：大尺寸食材摄影 + 优雅标题排版
    * 中部信息区（60%）：多层次信息模块网格系统
    * 底部注释区（10%）：来源标注 + 设计细节

【顶部展示区 - 视觉焦点】
• 食材名称：超大字号，细线体/宋体，字间距加宽
• 拉丁学名：小字号斜体，灰色调
• 食材分类标签：极简胶囊形状标签
• 主图：去背景食材特写，工作室灯光，微阴影
• 原产地小型地图图示
• 当季时间轴线条图

【中部核心信息区 - 9大模块】

1、营养成分详解
- 圆环图：卡路里、蛋白质、碳水、脂肪占比
- 条形图：维生素A/C/E/K含量对比
- 矿物质微量元素列表（钙、铁、锌等）
- 每100g营养数据精确标注
- GI值（升糖指数）可视化刻度尺

2、健康功效地图
- 人体轮廓图标注受益部位
- 5-6个主要功效图标化展示
- 功效强度等级标识（⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐）
- 科学研究来源小标注

3、烹饪方法矩阵
- 8-10种烹饪方式图标网格
- 每种方式最佳温度/时间参数
- 营养保留率百分比显示
- 推荐指数星级评价
- 难度等级色彩标识

4、四季食用指南
- 圆形时间轮盘设计
- 标注最佳食用月份
- 不同季节功效变化说明
- 时令搭配建议

5、黄金搭配矩阵
- 9宫格搭配食材小图标
- 搭配理由简短标注
- 协同增效/相克警示
- 经典菜品配方示例
- 营养互补关系连线图

6、适宜人群画像
- 人群图标（儿童/孕妇/老人/运动员等）
- 推荐程度色彩编码
- 特殊人群剂量建议
- 年龄段分类指南

7、禁忌与注意事项
- 红色警示框设计
- 不宜人群清晰列举
- 过敏源标识
- 药物相互作用提示
- 最大摄入量警戒线

8、选购与储存指南
- 新鲜度判断要点（颜色/手感/气味）
- 品质等级划分图示
- 最佳储存温度/湿度数据
- 保鲜期时间轴
- 冷藏/冷冻/常温图标指南

9、趣味知识扩展
- 历史小故事（起源/传说）
- 世界各地别名
- 年产量数据可视化
- 有机/转基因标识说明
- 可持续性评级

【视觉系统 - 极简艺术美学】

配色方案：
- 主色：食材本身的自然色彩提取
- 辅色：大地色系（米白/燕麦/亚麻/石墨灰）
- 强调色：克制使用1-2个高纯度色彩
- 背景：纯白或极浅灰（#FAFAFA）
- 文字：深灰而非纯黑（#2C2C2C）

字体系统：
- 标题：超细线条无衬线字体（Helvetica Neue UltraLight）
- 正文：现代几何字体（DIN/Futura）
- 数据：等宽字体（Roboto Mono）
- 中文：思源黑体Light/方正兰亭黑
- 字号层级：6级字号系统（48/32/24/16/12/10pt）

图标系统：
- 统一2pt线宽
- 圆角一致性（2px）
- 24x24px网格对齐
- stroke而非fill优先
- 负空间利用

布局系统：
- 12列网格系统
- 8pt基准网格对齐
- 模块间距：24pt/32pt/48pt
- 边距：页边距48pt起
- 卡片圆角：8-12px
- 微妙分割线：0.5pt，15%透明度

质感细节：
- 微渐变背景（3-5%色值变化）
- 柔和投影（0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)）
- 磨砂玻璃效果（backdrop-filter: blur(20px)）
- 元素间微妙高度差异（海拔系统）
- 数据区域淡色填充（5%透明度）

【信息可视化原则】
- 数据图表：Edward Tufte简约数据墨水原则
- 去除非必要装饰
- 图表网格线极淡（10%透明度）
- 数据点精确标注
- 趋势线平滑自然

【呼吸感营造】
- 模块间留白≥模块内容宽度的25%
- 文字行间距1.6-1.8倍
- 段落间距≥2行高
- 图文组合留白法则

风格关键词：
瑞士国际主义平面设计、日本侘寂美学、包豪斯功能主义、
斯堪的纳维亚极简主义、Dieter Rams设计哲学、
无印良品视觉语言、Kinfolk杂志美学、
苹果产品设计语言、Google Material Design精髓

title: 建筑材质替换
prompt: 将场景中的[当前材质]改为[新材质]材质，保持图片的结构和视角不变

title: 冬日时尚大片：女性与骏马的优雅共生
author: kingofdairyque
prompt: 请根据所提供的图片创作一篇时尚专题报道，确保所有关键元素的呈现都达到极致的精确度（即“纳米级”的精确度）。同时，要深刻理解整个场景的内涵：保留女孩最初的姿势、她头发轻轻摆动的样子、她的目光方向，以及她与马之间的自然互动。保持冬季背景的设定，但要加强拍摄氛围，使其符合高端时尚杂志的审美标准。
prompt_en: Create a fashion editorial interpretation of the image provided, maintaining the nano-level of accuracy of all key elements. Maintain an intellectual understanding of the scene: leave the girl's initial pose, the soft movement of her hair, the direction of her gaze and the natural connection with the horse. Keep the winter landscape, but strengthen the shooting atmosphere so that it corresponds to the aesthetics of elite fashion magazines.

title: 橘猫仰卧地毯萌态十足
author: Lapin mars
prompt: 发布的图片是一只非常放松的猫咪的可爱特写：它仰面躺在一块柔软的地毯上，四肢朝天。
prompt_en:
Gemini Nano Banana Pro
Prompt court : Une photo adorable d'un chat très détendu, allongé sur le dos avec les quatre pattes en l'air sur un tapis moelleux.
#Gemini #NanoBananaPro #Image https://t.co/8VBBueTCo6

title: 奥林巴斯财务造假案解析
author: 兎耳山ルカ 公認会計士
prompt: 制作幻灯片图片，解释奥林巴斯会计欺诈案。
prompt_en: オリンパスの粉飾事例を説明するスライドを画像として作って

title: 暗光卧室自拍，冷色调屏幕光，慵懒深夜氛围
author: Anissa
prompt:
垂直构图，在昏暗的卧室里，夜晚，一张逼真的低光手机自拍。与参考图相同的人物面部（无变化）。苍白的面部被冷蓝色调的屏幕光照亮；背景大部分黑暗，左侧是米色的遮光窗帘。营造出困倦、舒适、深夜低保真（lo-fi）的氛围。
特写镜头，略微低角度。主体趴着，靠在一个带有细微图案的灰色枕头上。凌乱的黑色睡醒发型，带有几缕刘海。眼神柔和、迷离/空洞，嘴巴微张。手靠近脸部，食指轻触下唇。
穿着黑色无袖吊带衫；细蕾丝肩带可见，左肩裸露。柔焦，可见颗粒/噪点，打光的脸部与黑暗背景之间形成高对比度。
负面提示词：
明亮的日光，阳光，影棚/闪光灯照明，暖色调/橙色调，户外，锐利对焦，专业相机，4K 清晰，光滑皮肤，浓妆，卡通，动漫，3D 渲染，变形的手，多余/缺失的手指，脸部失焦。
prompt_en:
Vertical, realistic low-light phone selfie in a dim bedroom at night. Same face as reference (no changes). Cool bluish-purple screen glow lighting on a pale face; background mostly dark with beige blackout curtains on the left. Sleepy, cozy, late-night lo-fi vibe.
Close-up, slightly low angle. Subject lying on stomach, propped on a grey pillow with subtle pattern. Messy black bedhead hair with wispy bangs. Soft, dreamy/blank stare, mouth slightly open. Hand near face, index finger touching lowerlip.
Wearing a black sleeveless camisole; thin lace strap visible, left shoulder bare. Soft focus, visible grain/noise, high contrast between lit face and dark background.
Negative Prompt:
bright daylight, sunshine, studio/flash lighting, warm/orange tones, outdoor, sharp focus, professional camera, 4k clean, smooth skin, heavy makeup, cartoon, anime, 3D render, deformed hands, extra/missing fingers, out-of-focus face.

title: 未来厨房神器九宫格
author: Gadgetify
prompt:
第一阶段提示：分析这些 [{"object 1" "OBJECT 1"}]、[{"object 2" "OBJECT 2"}]、[{"object 3" "OBJECT 3"}] 图像。提取：1) 主要功能，2) 材料 DNA（金属/塑料比例、质地），3) 人体工程学特征（握持角度、重量分布），4) 机械原理，5) 文化联想。以结构化 JSON 格式输出。

第二阶段提示：创建 3x3 网格的超逼真产品渲染图，背景为纯白色。每个单元格都必须是一个超现实的 3D 概念，融合了先前分析中的元素。对于每项发明，请用 Helvetica Neue 字体添加极简的海军蓝文本：[发明名称]、[核心机制]、[用例]。风格：迪特·拉姆斯 遇上 戴森——简洁、科技、高端。包含微妙的阴影和每个单元格上 1 像素的金色边框。使发明既荒谬又合理（例如，“声波削皮器：利用声波剥离蔬菜”）。
prompt_en:
PHASE 1 PROMPT: Analyze these [{"object 1" "OBJECT 1"}], [{"object 2" "OBJECT 2"}], [{"object 3" "OBJECT 3"}] images. Extract: 1) Primary function, 2) Material DNA (metal/plastic ratio, texture), 3) Ergonomic signature (grip angle, weight distribution), 4) Mechanical principle, 5) Cultural association. Output as structured JSON.

PHASE 2 PROMPT: Create a 3x3 grid of photorealistic product renderings on a pristine white background. Each cell must be a hyper-realistic 3D concept that fuses elements from the previous analysis. For each invention, add minimalist navy blue text in Helvetica Neue: [Invention Name], [Core Mechanism], [Use Case]. Style: Dieter Rams meets Dyson - clean, technical, premium. Include subtle shadows and a 1px gold border on each cell. Make inventions absurd yet plausible (e.g., "Acoustic Peeler: uses sound waves to strip vegetables").

title: 石雕鹦鹉工坊写实场景生成
author: Vera Collins
prompt: 一个雕刻着小石像（提供图片）的雕塑，带有凿痕和不平整的表面，坐落在雕塑家的工作台上。石屑、小凿子和强调纹理与形态的定向暖光。电影般的真实感。1080×1080。
prompt_en: A tiny stone-carved statue of {argument name="subject" default="image given"}, with chisel marks and uneven surfaces, sitting on a sculptor’s workbench. Stone dust, small chisels, and directional warm light emphasizing texture and form. Cinematic realism. 1080×1080.

title: 餐厅菜单设计需求
author: Min Choi
prompt: 我将在 {"location_zh" "马林"} 开一家名为 {"restaurant_name_zh" "Haein"} 的传统概念餐厅。餐厅主打韩国料理，所有菜品都采用有机、农场直供的新鲜食材烹制，并根据时令推出轮换菜单。我希望你设计一份菜单图片，其中包含以下 {"menu_details_zh" "[菜品列表、分区和设计说明]"}。
prompt_en: I'm opening a traditional concept restaurant in {"location" "Marin"} called {"restaurant_name" "Haein"}. It focuses on Korean food cooked with organic, farm-fresh ingredients, with a rotating menu based on what's seasonal. I want you to design an image - a menu incorporating the following {"menu_details" "[list of dishes, sections, and design notes]"}

title: 圣诞主题3D卡通角色设计
author: Pierrick Chevallier | IA
prompt: 一个可爱的卡通角色，正在做着有趣或滑稽的动作，穿着特定的圣诞服装或配饰，手里拿着一个小物品...
prompt_en:
🚨PromptShare🚨
CUTE CARTOON 3D Character
a cut...

title: 磨砂泡泡 3D 图标
author: @Anima_Labs
prompt_en:
Sandblasted Bubble 3D Icon Style, rendered in 3d_semi_transparent_detailed (3D semi-transparent fine detail).  
Icon theme: {{PlayStation Controller}}.  
Object analysis: retains contours (true), uses geometric-sensitive mapping (true), features smooth rounded edges and subtle internal reflections.  
Material properties: base materials include frosted semi-transparent plastic and matte translucent acrylic.  
Internal elements: floating colorful spheres visible through the shell.  
Surface finish: matte, diffused, semi-transparent with slight translucency.  
Texture: no external tint color; transparency reveals internal objects.  
Brand elements: none.  
Color scheme: primary colors in shades #FFFFFF and #F5F5F5; accent colors include #FF69B4, #FFA500, #6A5ACD, #00CED1, #FFD700.  
Contrast: extremely high.  
Lighting: soft ambient light combined with outline lighting; high intensity.  
Shadows: gentle glow beneath the object.  
Highlights: subtle edge glow and soft reflections on the top.  
Rendering style: modern 3D icon with internal colorful elements.  
Background: pure black.  
Camera angle: isometric 3/4 view.  
Depth of field: none; all details are sharp and in focus.  
Style notes:  
- Black background enhances bubble colors.  
- Frosted transparency appears subtly luminous against the black background.  
- Ideal for high-contrast, collectible-style icons.

title: 回眸凝视的神秘肖像
author: AIwithkhan
prompt: 这张专业的人像照片拍摄了一位年轻女性，她拥有一头乌黑、波浪卷、齐肩长的头发，正侧过身来直视着相机，脸上带着严肃而迷人的表情。她穿着一件紧身的深蓝色短袖连衣裙，配有一条褶皱裙摆。强烈的侧光突出了她的面部轮廓和背部线条。拍摄场景是一个光线昏暗、风格简约的房间，墙壁呈深蓝灰色，背景中有一扇模糊的木门。灯光营造出一种忧郁而高对比度的氛围，将观众的注意力完全集中在了这位女性身上。
prompt_en: A professional portrait photograph captures a young woman with dark, wavy, shoulder-length hair, looking back over her shoulder directly at the camera with a serious, alluring expression. She wears a form-fitting, dark navy short-sleeved dress with a pleated skirt. Dramatic side-lighting highlights her face and the curve of her back. The setting is a dimly lit, minimalist room with dark blue-grey walls and a blurred wooden door in the background. The lighting is moody and high-contrast, focusing attention on the subject.

title: 室内光线氛围-只开灯带
author: LeaderAI
prompt: 对该图片室内场景的光线进行设计，只开灯带

title: 甜美少女卧室自拍四连拍
author: Mirabelle♡
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "极其美丽的 18-20 岁的西方年轻女性，面部特征柔和精致，大而富有表现力的蓝色眼睛，浓密的长金色辫子，自然红润的脸颊，水润饱满的双唇，细微的雀斑，俏皮而妩媚的表情，戴着浅蓝色小碎花头巾，穿着露出乳沟的绿松石色紧身短款罗纹背心，复古浅蓝色牛仔背带短裤，白色贝壳项链，锁骨处有精致小巧的纹身，手指上戴着银戒指，另一根手指上戴着蓝色戒指，在卧室里自拍姿势，热带室内植物背景，龟背竹叶，自然日光，柔和温暖的室内照明，镜面自拍风格，四种不同的可爱姿势：{\"pose 1\" \"剪刀手眨眼\"} {\"pose 2\" \"嘟嘴亲吻\"}，灿烂的笑容，双手环绕脸颊飞吻，闭眼幸福微笑，高度细致的皮肤纹理，逼真的妆容，水润肌肤，电影级调色，柔和的绿松石美学，超现实主义，8k",
  "negative_prompt": "模糊，低质量，变形的脸，糟糕的解剖结构，多余的肢体，变异的手，拙劣的脸部描绘，比例失调，水印，文字，标志，过度曝光，曝光不足，塑料皮肤，浓妆，过多修容，恐怖谷效应，卡通，3d 渲染，动漫",
  "aspect_ratio": "3:4",
  "style": "写实摄影",
  "lighting": "柔和自然日光 + 温暖室内反弹光",
  "quality_tags": "杰作，最佳质量，超细节，锐利对焦，8k 超高清",
  "camera": "智能手机自拍，轻微广角，自然晕影",
  "color_palette": "绿松石色，柔和蓝色，柔和色调，白色贝壳，温暖米色肤色",
  "mood": "俏皮，妩媚，青春，夏日，梦幻，快乐"
}
```

  "prompt": "extremely beautiful young western woman 18-20 years old, delicate soft facial features, big expressive blue eyes, long thick blonde  braids, natural blush cheeks, glossy full lips, subtle freckles, playful and flirty expressions, wearing light blue bandana headscarf with small white patterns, turquoise tight cropped ribbed tank top showing cleavage, vintage light blue denim overalls shorts, white shell necklace choker, delicate tiny tattoo on collarbone, silver ring on finger, blue ring on another finger, selfie pose in bedroom, tropical houseplant background, monstera leaves, natural daylight, soft warm indoor lighting, mirror selfie style, four different cute poses: {"pose 1" "peace sign wink"} {"pose 2" "kissy lips"}, big happy smile, blowing kiss with hands around face, eyes closed smiling blissfully, highly detailed skin texture, realistic makeup, dewy skin, cinematic color grading, pastel turquoise aesthetic, photorealistic, 8k",

}

title: 可爱少女温馨咖啡馆肖像
author: Anissa
prompt: 一张年轻女孩坐在舒适咖啡馆的高品质可爱肖像照片，采用明亮柔和的闪光风格拍摄。主要科目（女生）：•可爱年轻的脸庞，白皙无瑕的肌肤•柔和的自然妆容，搭配粉色腮红•一只眼睛开玩笑地眨着眼睛，微微一笑•两条整洁的黑色辫子•戴着一顶超大的蓝色毛绒鼠标帽，有巨大的圆形耳朵、粉红色的耳衬和粉红色的小鼻子•双手高举帽子两侧服装：•粉彩条纹针织拉链开衫•颜色：淡蓝色、软黄色、淡粉色、白色条纹•开衫下可见浅蓝色衣领•舒适柔软的质地，略微超大的袖子姿势：•坐在前面•俏皮的表情，轻微的头部倾斜•双手向外拉动鼠标帽的长边咖啡馆背景：•极简主义明亮的咖啡厅内部•带糕点的玻璃展示柜•墙上的菜单板（模糊）•植物增添舒适氛围•温暖的环境照明，带有干净的白色调•轻微景深模糊表元素：•她面前的蓝色托盘•一小片分层粉彩蛋糕（粉红色+白色+蓝色），上面有草莓•一杯饮料，上面有生奶油，里面有樱桃•盘子旁边的叉子和勺子照明和摄像头：•带有明亮亮点的软闪光摄影•轻微过度曝光的皮肤光泽，可爱美观•3:4垂直构图•质地清爽，以柔和色调为主•没有刺眼的阴影•Kawaii咖啡馆快照氛围美学：可爱的粉彩，舒适的咖啡馆女孩，俏皮的表情，柔和的闪光，丰富多彩的快乐氛围。
prompt_en:
High-quality cute portrait photo of a young girl sitting in a cozy café, captured in a bright soft-flash lighting style.
Main subject (girl):
• Cute youthful face, fair flawless skin
• Soft glam natural makeup with pink blush
• One eye winking playfully, small smile
• Two neat black braided pigtails
• Wearing an oversized blue plush mouse hat with huge round ears, pink ear lining, and a tiny pink nose
• Holding both sides of the hat with her hands lifted up
Outfit:
• Pastel striped knit zip-up cardigan
• Colors: baby blue, soft yellow, pale pink, white stripes
• Light blue collar visible under the cardigan
• Cozy, soft texture, slightly oversized sleeves
Pose:
• Sitting front-facing
• Playful expression, slight head tilt
• Both hands pulling the long sides of the mouse hat outward
Café background:
• Minimalist bright café interior
• Glass display case with pastries
• Menu board on the wall (blurred)
• Plants adding cozy vibes
• Warm ambient lighting with clean white tones
• Slight depth-of-field blur
Table elements:
• Blue tray in front of her
• Small slice of layered pastel cake (pink + white + blue) with strawberry on top
• Glass of drink with whipped topping and a cherry inside
• Fork and spoon next to the plate
Lighting & Camera:
• Soft flash photography with bright highlights
• Slight overexposed glow on skin for cute aesthetic
• 3:4 vertical composition
• Clean, crisp texture with pastel tones dominant
• No harsh shadows
• Kawaii café snapshot vibe
Aesthetic:
Cute pastel, cozy café girl, playful expression, soft flash, colorful and happy atmosphere.

title: 标本盒与现实的穿搭美学双重奏
author: @LufzzLiz
prompt:
A vertical split-screen creative product photography composition on a clean white wall background. High-resolution, photorealistic, commercial advertisement quality.

Top Section: The Specimen Box
The upper half features an exquisite light oak wooden shadow box frame mounted on the wall. Inside, a specific outfit is displayed as an artistic flat-lay museum specimen: [Insert Clothing Details Here, e.g., a sleek black satin slip dress with delicate lace trim and thin spaghetti straps]. The garments are neatly pinned in place. Surrounding them are small thematic decorative props: [Insert Props, e.g., dried roses, vintage perfume bottles, silk ribbon]. Elegant calligraphy on the matte paper backdrop reads: [Insert Text, e.g., "Midnight Elegance" or "Silk & Secrets"]. Soft studio lighting accentuates the rich texture and drape of the fabric.

Bottom Section: Naked-Eye 3D Reality
The lower half creates a hyperrealistic "naked-eye 3D" illusion. A rectangular picture-frame border sits directly beneath the top box. A stunningly realistic young woman [Insert Model Description, e.g., a poised East Asian model with long wavy black hair, subtle smoky eyes, and a confident gaze] wears the exact same outfit as shown above.

She lounges casually on the bottom edge of the frame—one leg bent with foot resting inside the frame, the other leg elegantly dangling out into the viewer’s space. Her torso leans back slightly, elbow resting on her raised knee, fingers lightly grazing the fabric near her collarbone. Her body forms a soft, sensual S-curve that highlights the garment’s silhouette without overt exposure. She looks directly at the camera with a calm, knowing smile—inviting yet enigmatic. This dynamic, lifelike pose contrasts powerfully with the static, archival display above, creating visual tension between reality and presentation.

Technical Specs:
Soft natural shadows, ambient occlusion, bright and airy yet cinematic lighting, 8K resolution, Octane Render, vivid but refined color palette, ultra-detailed fabric textures (satin sheen, lace transparency, stitching), shallow depth of field, Vogue editorial style, filmic grain, professional fashion photography.

Negative Prompt (recommended):
blurry, low-res, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, deformed hands, cartoon, anime, doll-like, plastic skin, overexposed, cluttered background, text errors, mismatched clothing, floating objects, unrealistic proportions.
参考人物，想看老师制服
prompt_en:
A vertical split-screen creative product photography composition on a clean white wall background. High-resolution, photorealistic, commercial advertisement quality.

Top Section: The Specimen Box
The upper half features an exquisite light oak wooden shadow box frame mounted on the wall. Inside, a specific outfit is displayed as an artistic flat-lay museum specimen: [Insert Clothing Details Here, e.g., a sleek black satin slip dress with delicate lace trim and thin spaghetti straps]. The garments are neatly pinned in place. Surrounding them are small thematic decorative props: [Insert Props, e.g., dried roses, vintage perfume bottles, silk ribbon]. Elegant calligraphy on the matte paper backdrop reads: [Insert Text, e.g., "Midnight Elegance" or "Silk & Secrets"]. Soft studio lighting accentuates the rich texture and drape of the fabric.

Bottom Section: Naked-Eye 3D Reality
The lower half creates a hyperrealistic "naked-eye 3D" illusion. A rectangular picture-frame border sits directly beneath the top box. A stunningly realistic young woman [Insert Model Description, e.g., a poised East Asian model with long wavy black hair, subtle smoky eyes, and a confident gaze] wears the exact same outfit as shown above.

She lounges casually on the bottom edge of the frame—one leg bent with foot resting inside the frame, the other leg elegantly dangling out into the viewer’s space. Her torso leans back slightly, elbow resting on her raised knee, fingers lightly grazing the fabric near her collarbone. Her body forms a soft, sensual S-curve that highlights the garment’s silhouette without overt exposure. She looks directly at the camera with a calm, knowing smile—inviting yet enigmatic. This dynamic, lifelike pose contrasts powerfully with the static, archival display above, creating visual tension between reality and presentation.

Technical Specs:
Soft natural shadows, ambient occlusion, bright and airy yet cinematic lighting, 8K resolution, Octane Render, vivid but refined color palette, ultra-detailed fabric textures (satin sheen, lace transparency, stitching), shallow depth of field, Vogue editorial style, filmic grain, professional fashion photography.

Negative Prompt (recommended):
blurry, low-res, distorted anatomy, extra limbs, deformed hands, cartoon, anime, doll-like, plastic skin, overexposed, cluttered background, text errors, mismatched clothing, floating objects, unrealistic proportions.

title: 红发少女车库时尚写真
author: Busra
prompt: 一名 17 岁的女性，留着波浪状的红色长发，在有顶停车场的地面上完全蹲下；她穿着米色超大卫衣和卡其绿色褶皱迷你裙。她涂着裸色唇膏，妆容自然哑光，脸颊带有淡桃色腮红，双唇饱满。她的装扮搭配了红色细高跟凉鞋和肩上的红色法棍包。她的双腿略显丰腴，但很匀称。她的双手托着下巴，表情严肃地直视镜头。背景是混凝土柱子、天花板上横亘的红色管道，以及昏暗的工业风车库氛围。这是一张 8k 超现实、3:4 比例的写实街头风格照片。
prompt_en: A 17-year-old woman with long, wavy red hair poses in a fully squatted position on the floor of a covered parking garage; she is wearing a cream-colored oversized sweatshirt and a khaki green ruched mini-skirt. She has nude-toned lipstick, neutral and matte skin makeup, light peach blush, and full lips. Her outfit is completed with thin red heeled sandals and a red baguette bag on her shoulder. Her legs are slightly thick and aesthetically pleasing. Her hands are under her chin, and she has a serious expression looking directly at the camera. In the background, there are concrete columns, red pipes running across the ceiling, and a dim, industrial garage atmosphere. This is an 8k ultra-realistic, 3:4 aspect ratio, realistic street style photograph.

title: 冬季户外时尚写真：灰白拼接连帽羽绒服穿搭展示
author: Amanpreet Singh
prompt:
```json
{
  "prompt": "超逼真的全身户外时尚照片，一位长相自然的女性模特，穿着与参考图中相同的灰色抓绒内衬冬季夹克——哑光灰色外层，引擎盖内、前拉链和纽扣门襟处可见柔软的白色抓绒内衬。模特应看起来真实，20 多岁，齐肩棕色头发，淡雅的自然妆容，表情温暖放松。她在冬季白天（约 5200K）站在户外街道或公园小径上，光线柔和自然，阴影真实。夹克应略微修身，展现其精致的接缝、面料纹理以及引擎盖周围的抓绒边缘。搭配深色牛仔裤和冬季靴子。图像必须看起来像真实的时尚目录照片——逼真的人体皮肤纹理、正确的比例、细致的缝线和真实的景深。使用单反 50mm 镜头拍摄，f/4 光圈，ISO 200，背景虚化自然，以实现背景的真实感。",
  "negative_prompt": "无 AI 风格的面孔，无对称伪影，无过度光滑的皮肤，无 HDR 或发光效果，无影棚背景，无奇幻环境，无塑料质感，无裁剪构图，无重复肢体。",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "number_of_images": 1,
  "style": "超逼真的户外生活方式",
  "quality": "超高",
  "safety_filter_level": "严格",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "color_space": "sRGB",
    "resolution": "4k"
  }
}
```
prompt_en:
{
  "prompt": "Ultra photo-realistic full-body outdoor fashion photograph of a natural-looking female model wearing the same grey fleece-lined winter jacket as in the reference — matte grey exterior with soft white fleece lining visible inside the hood, front zipper, and button placket. The model should look realistic, in her mid-20s, with shoulder-length brown hair, minimal natural makeup, and a warm, relaxed expression. She stands outdoors on a street or park path during winter daylight (around 5200K), with soft natural lighting and realistic shadows. The jacket should appear slightly fitted, showing its detailed seams, fabric texture, and fleece edges around the hood. Outfit styled with dark jeans and winter boots. The image must look like a real fashion catalog photo — lifelike human skin texture, correct proportions, detailed stitching, and authentic depth of field. Captured with a DSLR 50mm lens, f/4, ISO 200, natural bokeh for background realism.",
  "negative_prompt": "no AI-styled faces, no symmetry artifacts, no over-smooth skin, no HDR or glow, no studio backdrop, no fantasy environment, no plastic texture, no cropped composition, no duplicated limbs.",
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "number_of_images": 1,
  "style": "hyper-realistic outdoor lifestyle",
  "quality": "ultra",
  "safety_filter_level": "strict",
  "image_config": {
    "output_format": "png",
    "color_space": "sRGB",
    "resolution": "4k"
  }
}

title: 离谱漫画生成器
author: 歸藏
prompt: 创作一个四格彩色漫画，采用竖排四格的形式。故事讲述的是一个人遭遇了一系列完全原创、离谱且极其荒诞的事件（请尽情发挥想象力）。对话幽默风趣、超现实，与剧情相符，且尽量简洁（请绝对不要使用“离谱”、“荒诞”等词语）。

title: 卡通鸭绘画四步教程
author: Umesh
prompt:
创建一个四格正方形布局指南，用于绘制一只简单的卡通鸭子。

1. 第一格显示一个灰色的椭圆形作为鸭子的身体。
2. 第二格显示一个灰色的较小圆形，与椭圆形的前部重叠，作为头部。
3. 在第三格中，头部添加了灰色的喙，身体底部连接了蹼足。
4. 最后一格展示了完成的鸭子，现在有了颜色，头部有两只眼睛，身体上有一个翅膀轮廓。
prompt_en:
Create a four-panel, square layout guide for drawing a simple cartoon duck.

1. Panel one displays a grayscale oval for the duck's body.
2. Panel two shows a grayscale smaller circle overlapping the front of the oval for the head.
3. In panel three, a grayscale beak is added to the head, and webbed feet are attached to the bottom of the body.
4. The final panel reveals the completed  duck with color now with two eyes on the head, and a wing outline on the body.

title: 日式微缩场景模型展示
author: 杏翼♂
prompt:
① "{argument name="scene 1" default="创建一个拉面摊"}"
② "{argument name="scene 2" default="一个男人坐在椅子上，双腿交叉，玩着弹珠机《海物语》"}"
③ "{argument name="scene 3" default="一个老式公共澡堂，柜台旁有一位奶奶，她腰间围着毛巾，手叉着腰，正在喝瓶装牛奶，一个孩子正在换衣服"}"
④ "{argument name="scene 4" default="一个可爱的女高中生房间"}"
prompt_en:
①「{argument name="场景 1" default="ラーメンの屋台を作って"}」
②「{argument name="场景 2" default="パチンコ台、海物語を打っている男性、脚を組んで椅子に座ってる"}」
③「{argument name="场景 3" default="昔ながらの銭湯、番台におばあちゃん、腰にタオルを巻いて腰に手を当てて瓶牛乳を飲んでいる、子供が着替えてる途中"}」
④「{argument name="场景 4" default="女子高生の可愛い部屋"}」

title: 金发女星夜登高楼，身着金纹礼服，尽显都市奢华风韵。
author: Qaiser Tzq

title: 超写实悬浮配料美食摄影
author: @Taaruk_
prompt: 超写实电影感美食摄影，一道传统菜肴呈现在质朴的木桌上。成品菜肴置于前景，葡萄叶卷肉丸汤，自然升腾的蒸汽。配料悬浮在菜肴上方，布局整洁有序：新鲜香草、米饭、肉末、洋葱、香料、橄榄油、土豆、鹰嘴豆、藏红花，每种配料独立且清晰可见。微妙的曲线信息图表线条和极简标签指向每种配料。温暖的摄影棚灯光，柔和的阴影，浅景深，大地色系调色板，高级食谱和美食教育风格。超精细纹理，逼真的食物表面，编辑级烹饪信息图表，照片般逼真，超精细，8K 质量。
prompt_en: Ultra-realistic cinematic food photography of a traditional dish presented on a rustic wooden table. Finished dish placed in the foreground grape-leaf rolls soup with meatballs with steam rising naturally. Ingredients floating above the dish in a clean, organized layout fresh herbs, rice, minced meat, onion, spices, olive oil, potato, chickpeas, saffron each ingredient isolated and clearly visible. Subtle curved infographic lines and minimal labels pointing to each ingredient. Warm studio lighting with soft shadows, shallow depth of field, earthy color palette, premium cookbook and food-education style. Hyper-detailed textures, realistic food surfaces, editorial culinary infographic, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 8K quality.

title: 都市夜景时尚男装写真，奢华都市生活氛围
author: 𝗦𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗺

title: 超现实几何艺术风格的数字插画
author: @fy360593
prompt: 将这张图片转换为具有超现实几何艺术风格的数字插画。应用故障纹理、抽象形状和电影化构图。以原始照片的光线和色彩为基调来营造氛围，同时以一种风格化、梦幻且复古未来主义的方式重新构想这个场景。
prompt_en: Transform this image into a digital illustration with a surreal, geometric art style. Apply glitch textures, abstract shapes, and cinematic composition. Use the original photo’s lighting and color palette to guide the atmosphere, while reimagining the scene in a stylized, dreamy, retro-futuristic way.
